creator: obrien@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: closed->open

Your description led me to believe that your problem was that 
Building with "X11" support did not give you a working 'gvim'. 

The current behavior has been the situation since 2007-09-15 
(GRN r199535 in the new subversion repository).  I do not know 
why this is being discussed so much now. 
'make show-options' has existed since 2007-12-19 (GRN r204121).
